reviews.comment:

Good service. Many vehicles arrive at once, but the staff manages the flow well for quick service.

reviews.comment:
Llegué 19:25, me dijeron que estaban cambiando de turno que serían 5 minutitos.
Media hora después encendí mi auto y me fui viendo que estaban en un cuartito sentados y con un mate en la mano.
No es la primera vez que tienen mala atención y actitud. Utilizo la YPF tanto de un lado como del otro del Buen Ayre y nunca me atendieron bien, siempre me sentí como que me estaban haciendo un favor. Ojo, aunque les muestro que soy socio del ACA, les importa un rábano.....

(Translated by Google)
I arrived at 7:25 PM. They told me they were changing shifts and it would only take five minutes.
Half an hour later, I started my car and left, seeing them sitting in a small room with a mate in their hand.
It's not the first time they've had bad service and attitude. I use the YPF gas stations on both sides of the Buen Ayre highway and they've never treated me well; I always felt like they were doing me a favor. Mind you, even though I show them I'm an ACA member, they couldn't care less.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6561338839586270574/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnMFpMYzFBRRAB
